card.name: CW09 Hatchling Season
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Yinglet creature tokens, then populate. (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card.name: CW13 Wing It
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Put a flying counter on it. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: CW11 Rootborn Defenses
card.text: Populate. Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. (To populate, create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card.name: CW88 Rapier Wit
card.text: Tap target creature. If it's your turn, put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) Draw a card.

card.name: CU10 Run Away Together
card.text: Choose two target creatures controlled by different players. Return those creatures to their owners' hands.

card.name: CR99 You've Been Caught Stealing
card.text: Choose one — • Threaten the Merchant — Each creature blocks this turn if able. • Bribe the Guards — You create a Treasure token for each opponent who was dealt damage this turn. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Spider Food
card.text: Destroy up to one target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Courage in Crisis
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature, then proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Street Rat
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) This creature has nimble as long as you control a Clue. (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater.)

card.name: Enclave Informant
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature you control connives. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.)

card.name: Throw
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or pay {2}. This spell deals 3 damage to target creature.

card.name: Kattajak's Hunters
card.text: Raid - At the beginning of your second main phase, if you attacked this turn, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Sundering Growth
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment, then populate. (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card.name: Syrupbloom
card.text: {1}, {T}: Create a Food token. When this creature dies, target player gets a poison counter. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)

card.name: Bioshift
card.text: Move any number of +1/+1 counters from target creature onto another target creature with the same controller.

card.name: CA05 Wayfarer's Bauble
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: CC01 Construction Crew
card.text: {2}, {T}: Surveil 1 (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: CA03 Clams
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Yinglet you control gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: CA02 Removal
card.text: {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: RU05 Mind Unbound
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a lore counter on this enchantment, then draw a card for each lore counter on this enchantment.

card.name: CW01 Sunrat
card.text: Lifelink When this creature dies, you gain 3 life.

card.name: CW02 Chorp Parasite
card.text: Flying This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter if you control another creature with flying or tunneling.

card.name: CW05 Mothguard Patroller
card.text: {1}{W}, {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: CW06 Mothguard Sentry
card.text: Vigilance When this creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: CW07 Small Tunneler
card.text: Small Tunneler enters with your choice of a tunneling counter or a first strike counter on it. (A creature with tunneling can't be blocked except by creatures with tunneling or reach.)

card.name: CW08 Doting Father
card.text: When Doting Father enters, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control, then educate. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control. Put a counter of that kind on target permanent you control.)

card.name: CW10 Chorp Swarm
card.text: Flying

card.name: CW12 Arrest
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.

card.name: CW14 Keep Out
card.text: Choose one — • Keep Out deals 4 damage to target tapped creature. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: CU01 Shieldrat
card.text: Tunneling (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with tunneling or reach.) When this creature dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: CU02 Intrepid Intruder
card.text: This creature enters with your choice of a tunneling counter or a hexproof counter on it. (A creature with tunneling can't be blocked except by creatures with tunneling or reach.)

card.name: CU03 Val Salian Librarian
card.text: {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. {2}, {T}: Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: CU04 Beizel's Scouts
card.text: Nimble (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater.) When this creature enters, target player mills 2 cards. (They put the top 2 cards of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: CU05 Student
card.text: When Student enters, educate. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control. Put a counter of that kind on target permanent you control.)

card.name: CU06 Baxxid Attendant
card.text: When this creature attacks, put a stun counter on it and draw a card. This creature can't be blocked as long as an artifact entered under your control this turn.

card.name: CU07 Baxxid Thief
card.text: This creature enters with your choice of a tunneling counter or a hexproof counter on it. (A creature with tunneling can't be blocked except by creatures with tunneling or reach.)

card.name: CU08 Chase Inspiration
card.text: Target creature you control gets +0/+3 and gains hexproof until end of turn. (This permanent can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)

card.name: CU09 Special Lesson
card.text: Counter target spell. Educate. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control. Put a counter of that kind on target permanent you control.)

card.name: CU11 Genetics Research
card.text: Draw two cards. Educate. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control. Put a counter of that kind on target permanent you control.)

card.name: UU05 Blossombind
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature can't become untapped and can't have counters put on it.

card.name: CU13 Lost to Antiquity
card.text: The owner of target nonland permanent puts it into their library second from the top or on the bottom. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: CU14 Cite Regulations
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If they do, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: CB01 Rattergnat
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, put a poison counter on target player. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)

card.name: CB03 Swamp Dweller
card.text: This creature enters with your choice of a deathtouch counter or a lifelink counter on it.

card.name: UB88 Poison Boy
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Whenever you sacrifice a Food, target opponent gets two poison counters. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)

card.name: CB06 Baxxid Pariah
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, target opponent loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.

card.name: CB08 Blitz Leech
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Remove all counters from that creature.

card.name: CB09 Dead Weight
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -2/-2.

card.name: CB10 Stab
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: CB11 Dwell on Hopelessness
card.text: Target player mills 2 cards, draws 2 cards, and loses 2 life. Remove a counter from up to one target creature. (To mill 2 cards, they put the top 2 cards of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: CB12 Lost in Deep Thought
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it and exile that card. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: CB13 Bake Into a Pie
card.text: Destroy target creature. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: CB14 Sorrowful Accident
card.text: Exile target creature. Put a menace counter on a creature you control.

card.name: CR01 Longrat
card.text: {T}: This creature deals 1 damage to target player.

card.name: CR02 Freelance Scavenger
card.text: When this creature enters, salvage 1. (Create a Junk token or return target artifact with mana value 1 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: CR04 Homeland Conqueror
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike.

card.name: CR06 Street Tough Gang
card.text: This creature enters with your choice of a trample counter or a menace counter on it.

card.name: CR07 Mountain Glider
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: CR09 Fling
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Fling deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target.

card.name: CR10 Heightened Reflexes
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Put a first strike counter on it.

card.name: CR11 Cathartic Reunion
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard two cards. Draw three cards.

card.name: CR12 Abrade
card.text: Choose one — • Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: CG01 Bushrat
card.text: Trample {3}{G}: Bushrat gets +3/+3 until end of turn.

card.name: CG02 Caravan Sentry
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a basic land, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CG04 Leaftailed Trilopoid
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: CG06 Banquet Hosts
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: CG07 Tiplod
card.text: When this creature dies, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: CG08 Enclave Guards
card.text: This creature enters with your choice of a vigilance counter or a reach counter on it.

card.name: CG09 Osseous Rex
card.text: Reach, trample

card.name: CG12 Fully Grown
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. Put a trample counter on it.

card.name: CG14 Dig for Lands/Creatures
card.text: Mill four cards. You may put a permanent card from among the cards milled this way. If you control a Yinglet or returned a Yinglet card to your hand this way, create a Food token. (To mill four cards, put the top four cards of your library into your graveyard. A Food token is an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: UW01 Figgins, Patriarch of Trade
card.text: {1}, {T}: Target opponent gains control of target permanent you control. If they do, choose one — • Create a Food token. • Create a Treasure token. • Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: UW08 Trade Edict
card.text: Whenever an artifact enters under your control, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn— • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. • Tap target creature an opponent controls. • Educate. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control. Put a counter of that kind on target permanent you control.)

card.name: UU01 Beizel, Patriarch of Scouting
card.text: Tunneling (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with tunneling or reach.) Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: UU07 Contest of Wills
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}. Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: UU06 Thist for Discovery
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard a basic land card.

card.name: UU02 The Oracle of Bakersroof
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, choose one— • Target player mills 3 cards. (They put the top 3 cards of their library into their graveyard.) • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: UU08 Curious Inquiry
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, investigate." (To investigate, create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: UB01 Chakki, Patriarch of Farming
card.text: Other creatures you control have "{1}, {T}, Mill a card: Create a Food token." (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: UB02 Thyppid
card.text: {1}, {T}: Create a copy of this creature. {1}, Sacrifice this creature: You may search your library for a Food card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. If you don't put a card into your hand this way, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: UR01 Kattajak, Patriarch of Hunting
card.text: Bloodthirst 1 (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, this creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it.) Raid - At the beginning of your second main phase, if you attacked this turn, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: UR05 Galvanic Blast
card.text: Galvanic Blast deals 2 damage to any target. Metalcraft — Galvanic Blast deals 4 damage instead if you control three or more artifacts.

card.name: UR07 Trash for Treasure
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact. Return target artifact card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: UG01 Poak, Patriarch of Foodstuffs
card.text: If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus an additional Food token are created instead. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Sacrifice three Foods: Draw a card.

card.name: UG05 Innkeeper
card.text: When Innkeeper enters, create a Food token. {G}, Sacrifice a Food: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: RW01 Elim Dorelga, War-Bonded
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Elim is dealt damage, put a +1/+1 counter on him. If you do, another target creature you control gets indestructible until end of turn. (Elim must survive the damage to get the counter.) Partner - Research group (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: RW02 Nervous Prodigy
card.text: Offspring {1} (You may pay an additional {1} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.) Whenever this creature is targeted by a spell, it phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: RW04 Merrs, Head Surgeon
card.text: Merrs enters with a +1/+1 counter on him. Once during each of your turns, you may cast a creature spell from your graveyard with mana value less than or equal to the number of counters on Merrs. Whenever you do, educate. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control. Put a counter of that kind on target permanent you control.)

card.name: RW05 Damning Verdict
card.text: Destroy all creatures with no counters on them.

card.name: RU01 Ran Ste-Su G'Mindel
card.text: Whenever you cast a creature or artifact spell, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") Activated abilities of Clues you control cost {1} less to activate while you control a non-Human creature. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana.

card.name: RU02 Voracious Reader
card.text: Offspring {2}{U} (You may pay an additional {2}{U} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.) {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then if this is the first time you have activated this ability this turn, discard a card.

card.name: RB02 Fashionable Matron
card.text: Offspring {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.) When this creature enters, salvage 3. (Create a Junk token or return target artifact with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: RB04 Entomb
card.text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your graveyard, then shuffle.

card.name: RB05 The Silent Ages
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Exile each opponent's graveyard. II — You become the monarch. III — Remove all counters from all other permanents.

card.name: RR02 Enthusiastic Maiden
card.text: Offspring {2}, offspring {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it. Then do this again.) Riot (This creature enters with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste.) First strike

card.name: RG02 Helpful Ingenue
card.text: Offspring {1}{G} (You may pay an additional {1}{G} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.) When this creature enters, distribute two +1/+1 counters among one or two target creatures you control.

card.name: MW01 Luminous Broodmoth
card.text: Flying Whenever a creature you control without flying dies, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a flying counter on it.

card.name: MU01 Show and Tell
card.text: Each player may put an artifact, creature, enchantment, or land card from their hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: MG01 Craterhoof Behemoth
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, creatures you control gain trample and get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control.

card.name: UM01 Dinnlan Deserter
card.text: When Dinnlan Deserter enters or attacks, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: UM02 De-Facto Patriarch
card.text: Nimble (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater.) When De-Facto Patriarch attacks, target player mills 2 cards. If defending player controls a non-Yinglet creature, target player mills 3 cards instead.

card.name: UM03 Scavenger Leader
card.text: Remove a counter from among permanents you control: Salvage 3. (Create a Junk token or return target artifact with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: UM04 Food Fighters
card.text: Trample This creature's power is equal to the number of Foods you control. Sacrifice a Food: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: UM05 Hatchery Nurse
card.text: Whenever you create a token, populate. Whenever you put a counter on a creature you control, educate. (To populate, create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control. To educate, choose a counter on a permanent you control. Put a counter of that kind on target permanent you control.)

card.name: UM06 Unscrupulous Merchant
card.text: Sacrifice another creature or artifact token: Put a +1/+1 counter on Unscrupulous Merchant.

card.name: UM07 Metalwork Artisan
card.text: Menace Whenever an artifact you control enters, choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. • Educate. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control. Put a counter of that kind on target permanent you control.)

card.name: UM08 Salt-Grass
card.text: Creature tokens and Food tokens you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color." Whenever you sacrifice one or more permanents, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token, then put a +1/+1 counter on each Plant you control.

card.name: UM09 Dig Site Foreman
card.text: Whenever an artifact you control enters, populate. Do this only once per turn. (To populate, create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card.name: UM10 Primal Empathy
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card if you control a creature with the greatest power among creatures on the battlefield. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control.

card.name: RM02 Lady Talleraine
card.text: Ward—Pay 2 life. When Lady Talleraine enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. Whenever an opponent removes a stun counter from a creature they control, they mill a card.

card.name: RM03 Brakka, Street Exile
card.text: When Brakka enters, create a Junk token. Whenever Brakka deals combat damage, you may have target opponent gain control of target permanent you control. When you do, draw a card, lose 2 life, and Brakka phases out until your next turn.

card.name: RM04 Lopin, Fancy Lad
card.text: When Lopin enters, salvage 2. Whenever you cast a spell from exile or a permanent you control enters from exile, create a Food token. Partner—Research group (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: RM05 Kassen Akoll, Officer-Diplomat
card.text: Affinity for Allies (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Ally you control.) {GW}, {T}, Remove a counter from Kassen Akoll: Assign a counter of that type to up to two other target creature you control. Draw a card. Partner—Research group (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: RM06 Narklet, Patriarch of Scavenging
card.text: {T}, Remove X counters from among creatures you control: Salvage X. (Create a Junk token or return target artifact with mana value X or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: RM07 Kalgkur, Provisional Guard
card.text: Whenever you flip a coin, flip an additional coin for each counter on Kalgkur (maximum 3) and ignore all but one. Whenever Kalgkur attacks, flip a coin.When you win the flip, draw a card. When you lose the flip, double Kalgkur's power until end of turn. Partner—Research group (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: RM09 Isher, Hiding from Herself
card.text: Menace Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Partner—Research group (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: RM10 Yannit, Research Partner
card.text: Trample, reach Yannit must attack each combat if able and must be blocked if able. {T}, Sacrifice a Clue or Food: Draw a card. Partner—Research group (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

card.name: CA01 Yinglet Spear
CA04 Manalith+
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: UA01 Soul-Guide Lantern
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile target card from a graveyard. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile each opponent's graveyard. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: UA02 Ball-and-Chain
UA03 Patchwork Banner
card.text: As this artifact enters, choose a creature type. Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: UA04 Fishing Rod
UA05 Elixer of Immortality
card.text: {2}, {T}: You gain 5 life. Shuffle this artifact and your graveyard into their owner's library.

card.name: RA01 Val Salian Library
card.text: Whenever a creature you control leaves the battlefield, if it had counters on it, put those counters on Val Salian Library. At the beginning of combat on your turn, if Val Salian Library has counters on it, you may move all counters from Val Salian Library onto target creature.

card.name: RA02 The Val Salian Field Guide
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") {T}, Sacrifice three Clues: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CL01 Tranquil Cove
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: CL02 Dismal Backwater
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: CL03 Bloodfell Caves
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: CL04 Rugged Highlands
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: CL05 Blossoming Sands
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: CL06 Scoured Barrens
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: CL07 Swiftwater Cliffs
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: CL08 Jungle Hollow
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: CL09 Wind-Scarred Crag
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: CL10 Thornwood Falls
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: CL11 Escape Tunnel
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Target creature with power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: RL01 Hallowed Fountain
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: RL02 Steam Vents
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: RL03 Blood Crypt
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: RL04 Overgrown Tomb
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: RL05 Temple Garden
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: MM01 The Great Leader
MM02 Viracroix Salia, Trademaster
card.text: Whenever you draw a card, put a +1/+1 counter on Viracroix Salia. {W}: Target player gains control of target Treasure you control. Create a Clue or Food token. {G}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice a Food: Creature tokens you control gain indestructible until end of turn. Tap them.

card.name: MM03 Vizlet, Enclave Matriarch
card.text: Ward—Discard a card. Whenever you draw a card or another Yinglet nontoken creature enters under your control, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn— • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. • Populate. • Educate.

card.name: MM04 He-Who-Knows-What-He-Did
card.text: Defender Devour tokens 2 (As this enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice any number of tokenses. This creature enters the battlefield with twice that many +1/+1 counters on it.) {R}, Remove a counter from this creature: Target creature you control fights another target creature.

card.name: MM05 Zeska Riptooth, Bandit Leader
card.text: Whenever one or more outlaws you control deal combat damage to a player, exile the top card of that player's library. You may cast it. If you don't, salvage 1. (Assassins, Mercenaries, Pirates, Rogues, and Warlocks are outlaws.) Whenever you sacrifice one or more artifact tokens, educate.

card.name: CU12 Yingify
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature is a Yinglet with base power and toughness 0/1. It can't attack and loses all abilities. (It also loses all other creature types.)

card.name: MA01 Zat Zhing
card.text: When this card enters, choose a creature type. {1}, {T}, Exile "Zat Zhing": Target creature becomes a 1/1 creature of the chosen type and loses all other creature types. Artifact tokens you control become 0/1 artifact creatures of the chosen type. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: RW88 Overencumbered
card.text: Enchant opponent When this Aura enters, enchanted opponent creates a Clue token, a Food token, and a Junk token. At the beginning of combat on enchanted opponent's turn, that player may pay {1} for each artifact they control. If they don't, creatures can't attack this combat.
